title: blotiella glabra
intro: Blotiella glabra is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations due to its antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Blotiella glabra is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
